title: parakeelya creethiae
intro: Parakeelya creethiae, also known as the Alpine Penny Cress, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is native to the high-altitude regions of Australia and New Zealand. Parakeelya creethiae has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of isothiocyanates. Herbal preparations of Parakeelya creethiae are typically made from the leaves and seeds, and have been used to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
